news.t: Tiny Announces Extension of Issuer Bid
ProShares Launches Three New Funds, Expanding Thematic ETF Lineup

holdings.infoBox: TINY is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Shanghai Biren Technology stock at 5.87%, Bruker at 5.70%, Veeco Instruments at 5.58%, SCREEN Holdings at 5.45%, and Applied Materials at 5.42%.

overview.description: The ProShares Nanotechnology ETF (TINY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Nanotechnology index, a market-cap-weighted index of 30 securities from developed markets involved in nanoscale technology. TINY was launched on Oct 26, 2021 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Tiny Announces Extension of Issuer Bid

data.title: ProShares Launches Three New Funds, Expanding Thematic ETF Lineup
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares has launched three new ETFs: ProShares On-Demand ETF (OND), ProShares Smart Materials ETF (TINT), and ProShares Nanotechnology ETF (TINY).
